title: Tech vs Mi Alliance
description: A Test of survival aganist Mi Alliance. Can you outmatch the Mi with technology?
body:
The Mi Alliance has come to take over your world. Stop them before it is too late. Create a base, defend and take back your world.

This modpack features are:
- Create and the addons like Big Cannon to defend your base
- AE 2 for Storage.
- Finally, the main one, Mi Alliance.

Other mods include Farmer's delight with ender delight and Tohou Little Maid.

NOTE: Quest are not available yet.
